item.title: 'I never see you at the club'. Okay? I never see you enjoying the splendor of film in your local cinema with a medium popcorn and a crisp diet coke
item.description: 'I never see you at the club'. Okay? I never see you enjoying the splendor of film in your local cinema with a medium popcorn and a crisp diet coke

item.title: Black strappy heels with white socks underneath, muddily stepping into a river, under a pink skirt
item.description: Black strappy heels with white socks underneath, muddily stepping into a river, under a pink skirt

item.title: Snufkin and Winnipeg sitting together on the couch; Snuf is fast asleep with his leg thrown over Winnie
item.description: Snufkin and Winnipeg sitting together on the couch; Snuf is fast asleep with his leg thrown over Winnie

item.title: Mirror selfie of Dana, sitting on her bed, pouting and wearing a yellow and blue floral top, black cardigan, gold hoop earrings, and blue jeans, with her long blonde hair hanging over her shoulder
item.description: Mirror selfie of Dana, sitting on her bed, pouting and wearing a yellow and blue floral top, black cardigan, gold hoop earrings, and blue jeans, with her long blonde hair hanging over her shoulder

item.title: Dana's feet, up and crossed, in leopard print ballet flats and blue jeans, sitting on her balcony
item.description: Dana's feet, up and crossed, in leopard print ballet flats and blue jeans, sitting on her balcony

item.title: An excerpt from 'Encampment: Resistance, Grace, and an Unhoused Community' by Maggie Helwig
item.description: An excerpt from 'Encampment: Resistance, Grace, and an Unhoused Community' by Maggie Helwig

item.title: The reflection of a blue sky with clouds on a tall glass building
item.description: The reflection of a blue sky with clouds on a tall glass building

item.title: Debbie Harry in a black dress and black boots sitting on a wooden chair and looking straight on
item.description: Debbie Harry in a black dress and black boots sitting on a wooden chair and looking straight on
